Cuthrough
  • Video AI Platform Development Checklist
  • View page source

Video AI Platform Development Checklist

1. High Priority (Core Infrastructure)

1.1 Security & Authentication (Critical)

  • Security Implementation

    • Authentication System

    • Authorization Framework

    • Input Validation Framework

    • Rate Limiting

    • Brute Force Protection

      • Login Attempt Tracking

      • Account Lockout System

      • IP-based Blocking

      • CAPTCHA Integration

    • API Keys & Credentials Setup

      • Production API Keys

      • Secret Keys Management

      • Environment-specific URLs

    • Data Encryption

    • Audit Logging

    • CORS Configuration

    • Security Headers

    • XSS Protection

1.2 Core Infrastructure

  • Project Organization

    • Security Module Structure

      • Websocket Security

      • CORS Configuration

      • Captcha Management

    • Processor Module Structure

      • FFmpeg Processor

      • Adaptive Compression

    • File Organization Cleanup

  • Storage Management

    • File Upload/Download System

    • Cache Management

      • Memory and Disk Caching

      • Multiple Cache Strategies (LRU, LFU, FIFO, TTL)

      • Size Limits and Eviction

      • Compression Support

      • Metrics and Monitoring

      • Event Handling

    • Cleanup Routines

      • Temporary Files

      • Processed Videos

      • Failed Jobs

      • Cache Cleanup

      • Log Rotation

    • Storage Quotas

    • File Format Validation

    • Content Type Verification

  • Middleware System

    • Authentication Middleware

    • Logging Middleware

    • Error Handling Middleware

    • Request Validation Middleware

    • Response Formatting Middleware

    • Compression Middleware

      • Multiple compression methods (Gzip, Deflate, Brotli)

      • Smart compression decisions

      • Streaming support

      • Configurable options

      • Compression metrics

      • Auto-tuning compression levels

      • Memory limits for streaming

      • Async support

      • Cache headers optimization

      • Vary header handling

    • Caching Middleware

  • Error Handling & Reliability

    • Error Tracking

    • Error Metrics

    • Retry Mechanisms

      • Fixed Delay Strategy

      • Exponential Backoff

      • Random Jitter

    • Fallback Strategies

    • Circuit Breakers

      • Basic Circuit Breaker

      • Distributed Circuit Breaker

      • Video-specific Circuit Breaker

      • Multiple Storage Backends

        • Redis Storage

        • DynamoDB Storage

        • S3 Storage

        • Consul Storage

        • Etcd Storage

        • Zookeeper Storage

        • Elasticache Storage

      • Failover Storage Support

      • Factory Pattern Implementation

    • Dead Letter Queues

      • Redis-based DLQ Implementation

      • Retry Mechanism

      • Failure Categories

      • Task Statistics

      • Cleanup Routines

      • DLQ Manager

  • Logging System

    • Structured Logging

    • Component-Level Logging

    • Log Rotation

    • Log Aggregation

    • Log Search & Analysis

    • PII Data Masking

1.3 API & Integration

  • REST API Development

    • Core Endpoints

    • API Documentation

    • Integration Tests

    • API Versioning

    • Response Caching

    • Request Validation

    • Error Response Standards

  • Webhook System

    • Event Notifications

    • Retry Logic

    • Webhook Configuration

      • Slack Integration

      • Custom Endpoints

      • Authentication

    • Delivery Confirmation

    • Event Replay Support

2. Medium Priority (Enhancement & Optimization)

2.1 Performance & Scaling

  • System Optimization

    • Memory Management

    • GPU Utilization

    • Batch Processing

    • Resource Pooling

    • Pipeline Optimization

    • Caching Strategy

    • Load Distribution

    • Connection Pooling

    • Request Queuing

    • Async Processing

2.2 Batch Processing System

  • Queue Management

    • Job Scheduling

    • Priority Handling

    • Progress Tracking

    • Error Recovery

    • Resource Optimization

    • Task Cancellation

    • Batch Size Tuning

    • Job Dependencies

    • Parallel Processing

    • Resource Quotas

2.3 Model Management

  • Model Infrastructure

    • Version Control

    • Model Registry

    • A/B Testing Framework

    • Performance Tracking

    • Automated Rollback

    • Model Metadata

    • Lifecycle Management

    • Model Serving

    • Model Monitoring

    • Resource Scaling

    • Warm-up Strategies

2.4 Data Management

  • Video Data Pipeline

    • Data Ingestion

    • Data Validation

    • Data Transformation

    • Data Export

    • Data Versioning

  • Data Quality

    • Quality Metrics

    • Validation Rules

    • Error Handling

    • Data Cleanup

  • Data Access

    • Access Control

    • Data Encryption

    • Audit Trail

3. Low Priority (Documentation & Monitoring)

3.1 Documentation

  • Technical Documentation

    • Sphinx Setup

      • Install Dependencies

      • Configure Project

      • Set up Build System

    • API Reference

      • Core API Documentation

      • CLI Documentation

      • Module Reference

    • Usage Examples

    • Quickstart Guide

    • Compression Documentation

      • Compression Strategies

      • Configuration Options

      • Best Practices

    • README Documentation

    • Developer Guide

    • Performance Guidelines

    • Architecture Documentation

    • Deployment Guide

    • Security Guidelines

    • Troubleshooting Guide

    • API Cookbook

3.2 Monitoring & Observability

  • Core Monitoring

    • System Metrics Collection

    • Custom Metrics Support

    • Alert Rules Configuration

    • Performance Monitoring

  • Alert Management

    • Severity Levels

    • Cooldown Periods

    • Custom Alert Rules

    • Multiple Alert Channels (Email, Slack, Webhook)

    • Alert History

  • Advanced Monitoring

    • Distributed Tracing

    • Enhanced Dashboards

      • Processing Metrics Visualization

      • Error Distribution Graphs

      • Real-time Updates

    • Advanced Analytics

      • Processing Time Analysis

      • Error Rate Tracking

      • Resource Usage Monitoring

    • SLA Monitoring

    • Cost Monitoring

    • Resource Prediction

3.3 User Experience

  • Developer Experience

    • SDK Development

    • API Client Libraries

    • Code Examples

    • Developer Portal

  • Admin Interface

    • System Dashboard

    • User Management

    • Configuration UI

    • Monitoring Interface

4. Completed Core Features ✅

4.1 Video Processing Pipeline

  • Frame Extraction (Decord)

    • Efficient Sampling

    • Time-based Selection

    • Error Handling

  • Scene Analysis (VideoMAE)

  • Object Detection (DETR)

  • Audio Processing (Wav2Vec2)

  • Text-video Alignment (CLIP)

4.2 Configuration System

  • Project Structure

  • Configuration Loading

  • Environment Support

  • Secure Storage

  • Version Tracking

  • Hot-reloading

4.3 Testing Infrastructure

  • Unit Test Framework

  • Integration Tests

  • Performance Benchmarks

  • Test Utilities

4.4 Input Validation Framework ✅

  • Type-based Validation

    • Video, image, and audio files

    • JSON data

    • Usernames and passwords

    • Email addresses and URLs

    • File paths and timestamps

    • Numeric and text data

  • Validation Rules

    • Required fields

    • Length constraints

    • Pattern matching (regex)

    • Allowed values

    • Custom validators

    • MIME type checking

    • File size limits

  • Security Features

    • Input sanitization

    • File type verification

    • Path traversal prevention

    • Special character handling

    • Size limit enforcement

  • Advanced Features

    • Schema validation

    • Bulk validation

    • Custom rule creation

    • Error reporting

5. Development Guidelines

  • Each new feature requires:

    • Unit tests

    • Integration tests

    • Documentation

    • Error handling

    • Monitoring

    • Performance benchmarks
